title: Margbensonia polystachya
taxonomy: Margbensonia polystachya is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the family of the Calophyllaceae. Further, it is placed in the genus Margbensonia, a group of flowering plants. The classification of Margbensonia polystachya is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Malpighiales, Family: Clusiaceae. The family Clusiaceae is a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the Stinking Chamomile family. This classification helps identify and categorize the plant in the botanical system.
